form.formComment: Dual acceptor. Last start 2nd in a small field at Hawkesbury Cl1-Sw on March 26 over 1600m, on a slow track; 4 len behind Midori Giant carrying 55kg at $7.50. The start before that second last of 10 at Warwick Farm Super 3yo+ Mdn on March 4 over 1600m, slow going 8 len behind Oso Spirited carrying 56.5kg at $41. Well placed out to this trip for the first time.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Bumped on jumping by Iron Legend.
Slow to begin and soon after hampered by Red Deer.

form.formComment: Third-up today. First-up 5th of 11 at Kembla Grange Prov Mdn-Sw on March 13 over 1400m, slow going 3 len behind Cabbucio carrying 58.5kg at $4.40. Second-up 7th of 10 at Hawkesbury Super Mdn-Sw on March 26 over 1600m, slow going 3.5 len behind The Big Blue carrying 58.5kg at $15. Looks the one to beat getting out to this trip.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced wide without cover from the 1200m.
Began awkwardly.
Began only fairly.

form.formComment: At the latest run made ground from midfield; 2nd of 7 at Wyong Mid Mdn-Sw on March 28 over 1600m, slow going 0.9 len behind Derry City Felix with 57kg at $3.50. The race before that 4th of 9 at this track Prov Mdn-Sw on March 6 over 1600m, 2.75 len behind Barrengarry carrying 57kg at $6. Racing very well and can win this without surprising.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Had some difficulty securing clear running rounding the home turn.
Near the 300m, taken out after being bumped by Tulou.

form.formComment: Second-up. First start sat on the pace before fading second last of 12 at Kembla Grange Cg&E Mdn on November 15 over 1300m, 10 len behind Aristocrat with 57.5kg at $16. Went for a break before returning second last of 7 at Goulburn Mdn-Sw on March 22 over 1500m, on a slow track; 5 len behind Angel City with 58.5kg at $9. Fitter and is expected to improve sharply.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced keenly in the early and middle stages.

form.formComment: Most recently 6th of 8 at this track Mdn-Sw on March 31 over 1850m, 11 len behind Cavalry with 59kg at $101. Before that 6th of 14 at Albury Cl1-Sw on March 19 over 2000m, on a slow track; 4 len behind Hells Spirit with 56.5kg at $61. Went around at Gosford on Thursday and is unlikely to back-up - has little hope if they do.

The start before that 7th of 9 at Albury Super Mdn on March 19 over 1400m, on a slow track; 3.5 len behind Carramar with 55kg at $31. Others make far greater appeal.

form.formComment: Most recently second last of 16 at Randwick in the G3 Adrianknox on April 4 over 2000m, on a slow track; 15 len behind Profoundly carrying 54kg at $151. The race before that 4th of 11 at Hawkesbury Mdn-Sw on March 17 over 1800m, 4.5 len behind So D'oro with 56kg at $8. Form at the provincials has been sound so she is a big chance to return to form.
